title: The Story of Ivy
author: Marie Belloc Lowndes
description: The Story of Ivyby Marie Belloc LOWNDES (Author)We are delighted to publish this classic book as part of our extensive Classic Library collection. Many of the books in our collection have been out of print for decades, and therefore have not been accessible to the general public. The aim of our publishing program is to facilitate rapid access to this vast reservoir of literature, and our view is that this is a significant literary work, which deserves to be brought back into print after many dec
